hero.pill_free: Free download. Pro upgrade unlocks all features.
hero.title_line2: Find logging with photo and audio.
hero.subtitle: Live GPS tracking, find logging with photo and audio, landowner permission management, and offline maps in a single Android app for metal detectorists.
mapcompare.label: Historical Map Overlay
mapcompare.description: Drag the slider to compare modern satellite imagery with USGS historical topographic maps. The historical layer shows mapped roads, homesteads, and buildings that may no longer appear on current imagery.
howitworks.label: Workflow
howitworks.description: SweepTrack Pro covers session planning, in-field tracking, and post-session review.
howitworks.step1_description: Open the Detecting Forecast for soil and weather conditions. Load the USGS Historical Topo overlay to identify old roads, homesteads, and buildings. Browse historic POIs from OpenStreetMap and Wikipedia in the Nearby Sites view.
howitworks.step2_description: GPS records your path across Street, Satellite, and Terrain base maps, with optional USGS Historical Topo overlay. Perimeter Guard alerts you when you approach the edge of your permitted area. Log finds with photo, video, audio, and notes.
howitworks.step3_description: Load past tracks on the live map to see uncovered areas. Compare sessions side by side. Export to GPX, KML, CSV, or JSON. Back up to Google Drive via Cloud Backup.
features.label: Features
features.description: GPS tracking, find logging, permission management, offline maps, and session analytics in one Android app.
features.gps_description: Real-time GPS path on the live map with distance, speed, heading, and altitude. Past coverage stays drawn so uncovered ground is visible at a glance.
features.heatmap_description: Density overlay of the GPS path for the current session. Green areas indicate light coverage; red areas indicate concentrated coverage.
features.oldmap_description: USGS historical topographic tiles layered onto modern satellite imagery. Reveals roads, homesteads, and buildings that may no longer appear on current maps. Opacity is adjustable.
features.presets_description: 60+ detector presets across 12 brands, including Minelab, XP, Nokta, Garrett, and Fisher. Load any preset in one tap. A Custom slot allows user-defined settings.
features.offline_description: Download map tiles for use without a cellular connection. Four sources: Street, Satellite, Terrain, and USGS Historical Topo.
features.perimeter_description: Draw the boundary of a permitted area on the map. The phone vibrates when you approach the edge and alarms when you cross it.
features.analytics_description: Per-session metrics for distance, duration, find count, and averages. Personal bests across all sessions.
features.export_description: Export sessions as GPX, KML, CSV, or SweepTrack JSON. Compatible with Google Earth and other GIS tools.
features.weather_description: The Detecting Forecast combines soil moisture, wind, temperature, and humidity into a 0-100 Detecting Score with a 7-day outlook. NOAA tide tables show 3, 7, or 14 day ranges from the nearest station.
features.sites_description: Historic POIs from OpenStreetMap and Wikipedia landmarks around your position. Split map and list view with distance and direct links.
features.compare_description: Compare 2 to 5 past sessions in overlay mode with a blend slider, or in split-screen side by side. Uncovered areas are visible at a glance.
features.backup_description: One-tap Google Drive backup of every session, find, preset, and permission. Restore on any device.
faq.label: FAQ
faq.q1: How does the Permission Vault keep me from trespassing?
faq.a1: Each landowner permission stores name, contact, approval status, expiry date, and the site boundary drawn on the map. The Vault shows which permissions are active, expiring, or expired. A PDF permission letter can be generated for any landowner, and expiry dates can be added to the phone's calendar with one tap. Combined with Perimeter Guard, the phone vibrates near the boundary edge and plays an audio alarm when it is crossed.
faq.q2: How do historical maps help me find better spots?
faq.a2: The app overlays genuine USGS historical topographic tiles onto modern satellite imagery. Old homesteads, schools, churches, roads, and settlements that may no longer appear on current maps become visible on the historical layer. Those locations often produce finds because they were inhabited; many are now undeveloped ground. Opacity is adjustable to blend the two layers. Coverage is best across the United States.
faq.q3: What does the Detecting Forecast actually measure?
faq.a3: The Detecting Forecast pulls weather data and generates a 0-100 Detecting Score with a verdict: Excellent, Good, Fair, Poor, or Bad. The score factors in soil moisture (wet soil conducts target signals deeper), wind speed, temperature, humidity, and precipitation. Available for any location, up to seven days ahead. Tips explain why conditions favor or hinder detection.
faq.q4: How do I know if I've already covered an area?
faq.a4: Three ways. The Coverage Heatmap renders a color-coded density overlay of the current session: green indicates light coverage, red indicates concentrated coverage, blank indicates none. Track Overlay loads past sessions onto the live map so previously covered ground is visible. Session Comparison stacks 2 to 5 visits to the same area to highlight uncovered ground.
faq.q5: What does the Measure tool do?
faq.a5: Tap the map to drop points and measure distance along a path with per-segment labels. Tap point 1 again to close the path into a polygon. Perimeter and area are calculated in hectares or acres using spherical geometry. Vertices are draggable, measurements can be saved to the Library with a reverse-geocoded name, and any polygon converts to a Perimeter Guard boundary in one tap.
faq.a6: Tap the Find button to drop a GPS-pinned marker. Choose one of 6 types (Treasure, Gold, Coin, Relic, Jewelry, Trash), set depth on a 0–40 cm slider, and optionally add a name, value, weight, notes, photo, video, and audio note. Every field is editable later. The Media Gallery groups photos, videos, and audio by session, and Find Search filters across sessions by name, type, or notes.
faq.q7: Does the app support my specific detector?
faq.a7: SweepTrack Pro is a GPS tracker and field toolkit, not a detector controller. It works alongside any metal detector. The app includes 60+ preset templates across 12 brands (Minelab, XP, Nokta, Garrett, Fisher, Teknetics, Bounty Hunter, Quest, White's, Tesoro, Detech, Rutus) plus a Custom slot for user-defined settings. Up to 10 configurations can be saved and shared via JSON export or QR code.
faq.q8: What's the difference between Free and Pro?
faq.a8: Free includes GPS tracking on all 3 base map types (Street, Satellite, Terrain), unlimited sessions, unlimited finds, 1 detector preset, 2 Permission Vault entries, 3 themes (Tactical, Amber, Cobalt), and core field tools (compass, ruler, back-to-start line). Pro adds: unlimited presets and Vault entries; Measure tool, Track Overlay, Coverage Heatmap, session comparison and merging, Perimeter Guard, USGS Historical Topo overlay, offline tile downloads, Detecting Forecast, NOAA tide tables, Cloud Backup, Night Vision, Coin Caliper, all 12 themes, and full export. Pricing: $19.99/year or $2.99/month with a 7-day free trial.
faq.q9: Does it work when I have no cell service?
faq.a9: Yes. Download map tiles in advance — Street, Satellite, Terrain, and USGS Historical Topo are all available for offline use. GPS tracking runs on the phone's hardware and requires no internet connection. The features that do require a connection are the Detecting Forecast, NOAA tide tables, and Nearby Sites lookup.
faq.q10: Is my detecting data private and safe?
faq.a10: All data is stored on the device. No servers, no analytics, no ads, no third-party tracking. The optional Google Drive backup writes an encrypted copy to the user's own Google Drive account; SweepTrack Pro has no access to that data. Export to GPX, KML, CSV, or SweepTrack JSON is available at any time.

pricing.heading_accent: Pro for the full feature set.
pricing.description: Free includes core GPS tracking and field tools. Pro unlocks the complete feature set.
pricing.free_description: Unlimited GPS tracking, sessions, and finds. 1 detector preset, 2 Permission Vault entries, compass, ruler, and back-to-start line.
pricing.pro_description: All Pro features unlocked. Unlimited presets, Vault entries, and exports. No ads.

foundernote.quote: I am NO software engineer. I design logos and brand identities. Fifteen years in — ten full-time at two businesses, plus freelance under my own PFA. Off hours: Adobe plugins, web tools, and vibe-coding Android apps with Claude. New favorite rabbit hole.
showcase.label: Featured Tools
showcase.description: Detecting Forecast, offline maps, nearby historic sites, detector presets, permission management, and cloud backup.
showcase.forecast_description: 0-100 Detecting Score derived from soil moisture, wind, temperature, and precipitation forecasts. Available for any location, up to seven days ahead.
showcase.offline_description: Download map tiles for offline use in four sources: Street, Satellite, Terrain, and USGS Historical Topo. Tiles are stored on device; no cellular connection required.
showcase.nearby_description: Historic POIs from OpenStreetMap and Wikipedia landmarks within range of the current GPS position. Includes distance and direct links to each entry.
showcase.presets_description: Built-in templates for 60+ detector models across 12 brands. Up to 10 custom configurations can be stored and shared via JSON or QR code.
showcase.permission_description: Track landowner permissions with approval status, expiry alerts to your phone's calendar, boundary maps, and PDF permission letter generation.
showcase.backup_description: One-tap Google Drive backup of all sessions, finds, presets, permissions, and settings. Restore to any Android device.
featuresall.label: All Features
featuresall.description: 45+ tools across GPS tracking, find logging, permission management, mapping, weather, and analytics.
featuresall.gps_description: Real-time satellite map with distance, speed, heading, and altitude. Three map types — Street, Satellite, Terrain — plus a USGS Historical Topo overlay (Pro).
featuresall.cloud_description: One-tap Google Drive backup of all sessions, finds, presets, permissions, and settings. Restore on any device.
featuresall.track_subtitle: Load past tracks on your live map
featuresall.track_description: Load past sessions onto the live map to see areas already covered. Each track is rendered in its own color so uncovered ground stays visible.
featuresall.track_bullet1: 6 path colors — Neon Green, Pink, Slate Blue, Orange, Gold, White
featuresall.track_bullet3: See uncovered ground at a glance
featuresall.perimeter_description: Draw a boundary polygon on the map. The phone vibrates when you approach the edge and plays an audio alarm when you cross it.
featuresall.perimeter_bullet1: Draw custom boundary polygons on map
featuresall.measure_description: Tap the map or drop a point at the current GPS position to lay out a line. Tap point 1 again to close it into a polygon. Perimeter and area are calculated in hectares or acres using spherical geometry. Drag any vertex to edit, tap a segment to insert a point, and undo or clear without leaving the map.
featuresall.saveguard_description: Save any measurement to the Library with a reverse-geocoded location name, or convert the drawn polygon to a Perimeter Guard in one tap. The measured shape becomes the haptic and audio boundary for the next session.
featuresall.saveguard_bullet5: Audio alarm when outside the zone
featuresall.permission_description: Track landowner permissions with approval status, expiry alerts to your calendar, site boundaries, and automatic PDF permission letters.
featuresall.oldmap_description: Overlay genuine USGS historical topographic tiles onto modern satellite imagery. Reveals old roads, buildings, and settlements that may not appear on current maps.
featuresall.offline_description: Download map tiles for offline use. Four sources: Street, Satellite, Terrain, and USGS Historical Topo. Works without a cellular connection.
featuresall.sec_findlogger_title: Find Logger with Photo, Video & Audio
featuresall.sec_findlogger_desc: Log every find with name, one of 6 types (Treasure, Gold, Coin, Relic, Jewelry, Trash), depth (0–40 cm slider), value, weight, notes, plus a photo, a video clip, and an audio note.
featuresall.sec_pindrop_desc: One tap drops a find pin at your current GPS position. Fill in the details later from the Finds list.
featuresall.sec_backtostart_desc: Toggle a line from the current GPS position to the session start. The compass overlay adds a return-bearing arrow.
featuresall.sec_sessioncompare_desc: Pick past sessions and compare them — overlay mode with a blend slider, or split view side by side.
featuresall.sec_presetslots_desc: Save up to 10 custom detector configurations and tap to activate. JSON import and export for sharing with friends.
featuresall.sec_export_desc: Export any session individually or in batch as GPX, KML, CSV, or SweepTrack JSON. Share or save to Downloads.
featuresall.sec_nightvision_desc: One-tap red monochromatic override on top of any theme. Preserves dark adaptation for dawn and dusk sessions.
featuresall.sec_compass_desc: Rotating compass dial with degrees, cardinal directions, and an optional green return-bearing arrow pointing back to your session start.
featuresall.sec_ruler_desc: 10 cm or 4 inch ruler along the screen edge with a 70-130% calibration slider so markings match your phone's real DPI.
featuresall.sec_forecast_desc: 0-100 Detecting Score for any location, up to seven days ahead. Includes soil moisture, wind, temperature, humidity, and condition-based tips.
featuresall.sec_tidetable_desc: Tide predictions from the nearest NOAA station. Pick 3, 7, or 14 day ranges. High/low times and heights grouped by day.
featuresall.sec_coincaliper_desc: On-screen measuring ring with DPI calibration. Matches against a built-in database of 130 coins across 9 regions — US, UK, Europe, Romania, Kreuzer, Asia, MEA, LATAM, Oceania.
featuresall.sec_nearbysites_desc: Historic POIs from OpenStreetMap and Wikipedia landmarks around your position. Split map + list view with distance and direct links to open them.
featuresall.sec_heatmap_desc: Density overlay of the current session's GPS path. Color indicates coverage intensity; uncovered areas remain blank.
featuresall.sec_careerstats_desc: Filter by 1mo / 3mo / 6mo / 1yr / all-time. Sessions, finds, distance, duration, averages, personal bests, and a Top Sessions ranked list.
featuresall.sec_permissionletter_desc: Fill in your name and pick a permission entry — the app drafts a polite permission request letter to the landowner that you can copy or share.
featuresall.sec_sharecard_desc: Generate a shareable PNG session card with path preview, stats, and find breakdown.
featuresall.sec_summaryscore_desc: Every session ends with an animated 0-to-score counter, path preview, and the weather snapshot captured during the session.
featuresall.sec_colorpins_desc: Find markers are color-coded by type on the map: Treasure (amber), Gold (yellow), Coin (blue), Relic (brown), Jewelry (magenta), Trash (grey).
featuresall.sec_sessionmerge_desc: Select multiple sessions in the History screen and merge them into a single unified record with combined stats.
featuresall.sec_findsearch_desc: Text search across every find you've logged by name, notes, type, or session. Filter chips for all 6 find types.
featuresall.sec_elevation_desc: Per-session terrain chart with min, max, range, ascent, descent, and average elevation in meters or feet.
featuresall.sec_permitreminders_desc: Add any permission's expiry date to your phone's calendar with one tap from the Permission Vault.
featuresall.sec_photogallery_desc: Photos, videos, and audio notes from your finds in one place. Filter by type, multi-select, share, or save to Downloads.
featuresall.sec_weathersnapshot_desc: Temperature, humidity, wind, and soil moisture are captured with every session and shown on the summary and share card.
featuresall.sec_autonamed_desc: Sessions are automatically named with a reverse-geocoded place label instead of raw GPS coordinates.
featuresall.sec_batchactions_desc: Multi-select sessions in History to rename (40-char limit), export, merge, compare, or delete in batches.
featuresall.sec_editfinds_desc: Every field on every find is editable — type, name, depth, value, weight, notes. Audio and photo playback in the detail view.
featuresall.sec_locationsearch_desc: Search any city, address, or place name from the Forecast, Nearby Sites, and Tide screens.
featuresall.sec_onboarding_desc: First-time walkthrough: Welcome, Detect Smarter, Your Territory, Field Arsenal, and Go Premium. Skip anytime.
featuresall.sec_languages_desc: Full UI in English, Romanian, German, Spanish, French, Italian, Portuguese, Dutch, Polish, Russian, Danish, Swedish, Turkish, and Hungarian. Switch on the fly from Settings.
featuresall.sec_unitstoggle_desc: Switch distance, speed, altitude, and depth between metric (m/km/km/h/cm) and imperial (ft/mi/mph/in) from the home screen.
featuresall.sec_colorthemes_desc: Tactical, Amber, Cobalt, Coral, Fuchsia, Slate, Navy, Operator, Monochrome, Neon Plasma, Neon Toxic, and Neon Laser — grouped into Neutral, Feminine, Masculine, and Neon palettes. 3 themes are free; the rest unlock with Pro.
featuresall.sec_detectorlib_desc: Built-in templates for 60+ detector models across 12 brands — Minelab, XP, Nokta, Garrett, Fisher, Teknetics, Bounty Hunter, Quest, White's, Tesoro, Detech, Rutus — plus a Custom slot you build yourself.
featuresall.sec_about_desc: App version and built-with credits (Kotlin, Jetpack Compose, Google Maps, Open-Meteo, NOAA, Overpass/OSM).
featuresall.sec_feedback_desc: Send a bug report or feature request from Settings — opens a pre-filled email to support.
pricing.feat_measure: Measure Tool (distance + area, save, convert to guard)
pricing.feat_hud: On-screen HUD (8 fields: time, distance, speed, altitude, finds, heading, accuracy, max speed)
pricing.feat_findtypes: 6 Find Types (Treasure / Gold / Coin / Relic / Jewelry / Trash)

blog.cta_card_text: covers GPS tracking, find logging, permission management, Detecting Forecast, offline maps, and more.
hero.price_anchor: Free to download. Pro is $19.99/year with a 7-day free trial.
pricing.founder_sub: One-time purchase. Lifetime access. Founder badge in-app.
pricing.founder_description: Available the day SweepTrack Pro launches on Google Play. Limited to the first 1,000 customers. The launch list receives the purchase link when the offer goes live.
faq.q11: Will GPS tracking drain my battery?
faq.a11: Active GPS tracking uses approximately 10–15% battery per hour, comparable to Google Maps in navigation mode. A power bank covers a full-day session. On Xiaomi, Samsung, OnePlus, and other devices that aggressively limit background apps, SweepTrack Pro detects the manufacturer and shows the exact battery setting required to keep tracking running with the screen off.
faq.q12: I'm new to metal detecting. Will this work for me?
faq.a12: Yes. The first-launch tutorial covers tracking, map controls, history, statistics, and other features across five slides. The Free tier includes unlimited GPS tracking, sessions, and finds. The Guides section of this site contains 30+ articles covering both the app and the hobby.
faq.a13: Not yet. SweepTrack Pro is currently Android-only. iPhone support is being evaluated but isn't on the roadmap with a release date. Join the launch list to be notified if and when an iOS version becomes available.
featuresall.sec_rankladder_desc: Eight rank tiers from New Explorer to Master Detectorist, plus a Founder badge for the first 1,000 customers.
featuresall.sec_greetings_desc: Your name appears at the top of the home screen with a rotating greeting that changes each session.
featuresall.sec_verdict_desc: The Detecting Forecast distills weather, soil moisture, wind, and your active permits into a one-word recommendation.
featuresall.sec_moon_desc: Eight moon phases shown alongside the daily forecast. Computed locally, no internet needed.
featuresall.sec_brandcolors_desc: Each detector preset displays in its manufacturer's brand color: Minelab blue, Garrett amber, XP orange, Nokta green, Fisher purple.
featuresall.sec_oemrationale_desc: On Xiaomi, Samsung, OnePlus, and other devices that aggressively kill background apps, SweepTrack Pro detects the manufacturer and shows the exact battery setting needed to keep GPS tracking running with the screen off.
featuresall.sec_atomicrestore_desc: Restoring a backup while a session is recording would normally overwrite the active session. SweepTrack Pro prompts you to stop the recording first.
featuresall.sec_sessiontags_desc: Tag any session as Park, Beach, Farm, Forest, Field, Historic, Private, or Public. Filter your history by tag later.
featuresall.sec_signaldiary_desc: Log VDI, signal strength, and one of seven soil types (sandy, clay, loam, rocky, chalk, peat, gravel) for each find.
featuresall.sec_calendarreminder_desc: Add any landowner permission's expiry date to your phone's calendar with one tap from the Permission Vault.
